rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure by providing a polished prose version of the paragraph and flagging potential issues.
rationale.RX.1: While the agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the contribution claim), it does not mark confidence or missing evidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces a new error by overstating the contribution of the system without providing sufficient evidence to support the claim.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
